name: Jagatpura & Mahal Road High-Traffic Zone
description: Heavy, fast-moving traffic corridor with crowded intersections. Frequent accidents involving pedestrians and two-wheelers.
alert_message: You are entering a high-alert zone. Stay vigilant of heavy, fast-moving traffic and keep valuables secure in crowded areas.

name: SKIT & JECRC Heavy Congestion Zone
description: College area with extreme congestion during peak hours. Auto-rickshaws and bikes move unpredictably.
alert_message: Heavy congestion zone. Expect slow-moving, unpredictable traffic. Avoid crossing roads without pedestrian signals.

name: Akshaya Patra Temple Crowded Area
description: Major temple area with large pilgrim gatherings. Risk of stampede during festivals and peak hours.
alert_message: Crowded temple zone. Keep belongings close, avoid peak prayer times (6-8 AM, 6-8 PM) for a safer visit.

name: Jagatpura Railway Station Transit Zone
description: Busy transit area with unregulated auto-rickshaws, petty theft, and overcrowding during train arrivals.
alert_message: Railway station transit zone. Watch for pickpockets and overcharging auto-rickshaws. Use pre-paid taxi counters.

name: Jaipur International Airport Transit Zone
description: Airport area with unauthorized cab operators and tourist scams targeting arriving visitors.
alert_message: Airport area. Use only authorized airport taxis or app-based cabs. Avoid unsolicited travel offers.

name: Jaipur Old City Traffic Hazard
description: Extremely narrow streets with heavy mixed traffic — vehicles, animals, and pedestrians in Pink City area.
alert_message: Old City narrow lanes. Beware of fast-moving bikes, cattle, and heavy tourist crowds. Stay on sidewalks.

name: Nahargarh Fort Remote Trail Zone
description: Steep, isolated hill trails with no mobile network coverage. Risk of falls and heat exhaustion.
alert_message: REMOTE AREA: Limited mobile network, steep trails. Carry water, inform someone of your route. Do not hike alone after 4 PM.

name: Amer Fort Overcrowding Zone
description: Major tourist attraction with extreme crowding, steep steps, and heat exposure during midday.
alert_message: Peak crowding zone. Visit before 9 AM or after 4 PM. Watch for slippery steps and stay hydrated.

name: Sindhi Camp Bus Terminal Chaos Zone
description: Jaipur's busiest bus terminal with aggressive touts, pickpockets, and chaotic traffic.
alert_message: High-risk transit zone. Keep bags zipped and in front. Negotiate bus/auto fares BEFORE boarding.

name: Malviya Nagar Night Safety Zone
description: Commercial area that becomes poorly lit after 10 PM with reduced police patrols.
alert_message: Safe during daytime. Exercise caution after 10 PM — reduced lighting and fewer people on streets.
